text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I killed this break! I redid my nails and went
shopping and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahh, it was the best break ever! Hey, what if we took today off too?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...I know, I know. We have to train. Fiiine, you
don't need to tell me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Tosen Jordan has recharged her
batteries after a fulfilling break!
